name: MACERICH CO
business: The Company is involved in the acquisition, ownership, development, redevelopment, management and leasing of regional and community/power shopping centers located throughout the United States. As of December 31, 2025, the Operating Partnership owned or had an ownership interest in 37 regional retail centers and one community/power shopping center, totaling approximately 39 million square feet of gross leasable area.
sellsTo: retail tenants (Mall Stores, Freestanding Stores, Anchors)

exposures.sentence: The Company is involved in the acquisition, ownership, development, redevelopment, management and leasing of regional and community/power shopping centers located throughout the United States.

There is also increasing competition from other retail formats and technologies, such as lifestyle centers, power centers, outlet centers and online retail shopping that could adversely affect the Company's revenues.

We face risks associated with and have been the target of security breaches through cyber attacks, cyber intrusions or otherwise, as well as other significant disruptions of our information technology (IT) networks and related systems.

catalysts.sentence: On June 23, 2025, the Company acquired Crabtree Mall, a 1,321,000 square foot regional retail center in Raleigh, North Carolina, for a total purchase price of $290.0 million.

On August 18, 2025, the Company closed on the sale of Lakewood Center in Lakewood, California, for $332.1 million, including the assumption by the buyer of the $317.1 million loan on the property that had a June 2026 maturity date.
On August 20, 2025, the Company closed on the sale of Valley Mall in Harrisburg, Virginia, for $22.1 million, which resulted in a gain on sale of assets of $0.3 million.
On March 27, 2025, the Company closed a $340.0 million, ten-year loan on Washington Square, which matures on April 6, 2035.
On August 7, 2025, the Company closed on an initial $159.1 million two-year term loan with two one-year extension options on Crabtree Mall.

catalysts.event: Extension of loan on South Plains Mall
catalysts.sentence: On February 6, 2026, the Company extended the loan maturity on the $200.0 million loan at South Plains Mall to November 6, 2029, at the existing rate of 4.22%.

catalysts.event: Default on loan at Twenty Ninth Street
catalysts.sentence: Effective February 6, 2026, the $76.5 million loan (at the Company s pro rata share) at Twenty Ninth Street is in default.

catalysts.event: Redevelopment of Scottsdale Fashion Square completion
catalysts.sentence: The opening will be in phases which began in 2024, with anticipated completion in 2027.

catalysts.event: Green Acres Mall redevelopment tenant openings
catalysts.sentence: The majority of the tenants are expected to open in 2026 or 2027.
The anticipated opening will be in phases beginning in 2027.

catalysts.event: Sale of outparcel at Washington Square post-year-end
catalysts.sentence: On January 15, 2026, the Company sold an additional outparcel at Washington Square in Portland, Oregon for $13.0 million and used the net proceeds of approximately $12.4 million for general corporate purposes.

catalysts.event: Expected sale of La Cumbre Plaza
catalysts.sentence: The Company is under contract to sell La Cumbre Plaza, located in Santa Barbara, California, for $11.0 million, which is expected to close in the second quarter of 2026, subject to customary closing conditions.
